title: Shirahoshi’s Power Matters

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No matter how big those legs are, they can't withstand our deadly venue!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you think you can poison this, then be my guest!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Steel should be fought with steel!! Leave this to me!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Did you see my brilliant aim?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How did the cockpit get so much bigger with the flip of a single lever?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That guy's meant to be a ship-wright ... right? A

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Don't you have fighting to do?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The ten of them are taking on a hundred thousand enemies without breaking a sweat!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: They're really getting on my nerves...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There are only ten of them, Kraken!! i

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: crush them underfoot!! Put an end to this farce !!!

summary: Shirahoshi’s Power Matters. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
